title: 4PK Hi Vis Bin Numbers for Wheelie Bins – 0-9, Letters A-D, 17cm Reflective Dustbin Stickers – Easy Application Neon Yellow Stick On Number Stickers - Weatherproof Self Adhesive Vinyl (2)
features: BUILD YOUR CUSTOM 4-PACK – Choose any numbers (0–9) or letters (A–D). Just add each one to your cart to create the exact combination you need for your bins, flats, or house number display.
INSTANT VISIBILITY, DAY OR NIGHT – Say goodbye to bin confusion. These ultra-bright reflective stickers make your bin instantly recognisable—even in darkness or from across the street.

DIAMOND-GRADE REFLECTIVITY – Made from high-performance microprismatic vinyl, with a diamond-pattern structure that reflects light directly back to its source. Visible from vehicle headlights, torches, or streetlights.

OUTDOOR-TOUGH & RAINPROOF – Built for UK weather. Rainproof, dirt-resistant, and windproof. While all bright yellows may fade slightly in strong sunlight, our premium vinyl maintains standout colour and clarity longer.

FITS ANY BIN. APPLIES IN SECONDS. At 17cm tall, each sticker flexes to stick securely on curved or flat bin surfaces—textured or smooth. Easy peel-and-stick application, with no tools and no residue if removed.
description: From the brand Previous page At Rubigo, we’re more than just a store. Dan and Sam, two friends dedicated to crafting high-quality products that enhance everyday life. With Dan’s keen eye for design and precision and Sam’s commitment to trust and reliability, we create products you can depend on. From innovative solutions to daily essentials, we always focus on quality, convenience, and exceptional service. How we get our start? Rubigo was founded by friends Dan and Sam to create high-quality, practical products. With backgrounds in finance and personal training, they built a brand on reliability, innovation, and great service. What makes our products unique? We enhance popular products with smarter bundles, thoughtful variations, and a seamless shopping experience—ensuring top quality and value without the guesswork. Why should you trust Rubigo? We offer top-tier service and hassle-free returns, backed by a trusted reputation and over a million happy customers.
